title: Operations landing page
prompt: Build a polished operations software landing page with a strong hero, trust indicators, feature highlights, pricing, and a clear book-demo call to action.

title: Inventory operations workspace
prompt: Create an inventory operations workspace where I can add products, edit stock counts, change status, and keep a visible saved list with clear update actions.

title: Revenue command dashboard
prompt: Create a React revenue command dashboard with KPI cards, pipeline summaries, region filters, and a recent deals panel.

title: Dispatch desktop workspace
prompt: Create a desktop dispatch workspace with a sidebar, active jobs list, technician filters, and a clear create-job action.

title: Orders workflow API
prompt: Build a small API service for order workflows with endpoints to list orders, create one, assign an owner, and mark one fulfilled.

title: JSON audit CLI
prompt: Create a command-line tool that reads a JSON file and prints a compact audit summary with key counts, nested depth, and obvious missing fields.

title: Date helper library
prompt: Create a small reusable TypeScript date helper library with formatting, date range labels, and relative-time helpers.
